name: KLEBSIELLA PNEUMONIA
dominant_finding: bulging of fissure (large amounts of inflammatory exudate) CHARACTERISTIC but unusual
distribution: propensity for posterior portion of upper lobe / superior portion of lower lobe
discriminating_features: bulging of fissure (large amounts of inflammatory exudate) CHARACTERISTIC but unusual
propensity for posterior portion of upper lobe / superior portion of lower lobe
empyema (one of the most common causes)

general: propensity for posterior portion of upper lobe / superior portion of lower lobe
bulging of fissure (large amounts of inflammatory exudate) CHARACTERISTIC but unusual
empyema (one of the most common causes)
uni- / multilocular cavities (50%) appearing within 4 days
